tasks.label: list-failed-scenarios
args: const fs=require('fs');const p='reports/cucumber_report.json';const data=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));const failed=[];for(const feature of data){for(const scenario of (feature.elements||[])){const failedStep=(scenario.steps||[]).find(s=>s.result&&s.result.status==='failed');if(failedStep){failed.push({feature:feature.name,scenario:scenario.name,line:scenario.line,step:failedStep.name,error:(failedStep.result.error_message||'').split('\n')[0]});}}}console.log('FAILED_SCENARIOS='+failed.length);failed.forEach((f,i)=>{console.log(`\n${i+1}. FEATURE: ${f.feature}`);console.log(`   SCENARIO: ${f.scenario} (line ${f.line})`);console.log(`   STEP: ${f.step}`);console.log(`   ERROR: ${f.error}`);});

tasks.label: git-commit-contract-b-only
args: feat(contract-b): add create contract B automation flow

tasks.label: git-commit-session-feature
args: test(contract-b): validate session timeout on emirates id search

tasks.label: contract-a-full-suite
args: @createContract or @approveContract or @editContract or @approveEditedContract or @extendContract or @approveExtension or @cancelContract or @approveCancellation or @negativeCreateContract

tasks.label: commit-contract-b-clean
tasks.command: git restore --staged .; git add tests/features/03_ContractB/01_create_contract_b.feature tests/steps/ContractB/create_contract_b.steps.ts; git commit -m "feat(contract-b): complete create contract B flow"

tasks.label: commit-contract-b-clean-cmd
tasks.command: git restore --staged -- . & git add tests/features/03_ContractB/01_create_contract_b.feature tests/steps/ContractB/create_contract_b.steps.ts & git commit -m "feat(contract-b): complete create contract B flow"

tasks.label: verify-remote-head-contract-b
tasks.command: git rev-parse HEAD & git ls-remote origin refs/heads/feat/create-contract-b

tasks.label: show-last-approval-artifacts
tasks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-ChildItem 'allure-results/unknown-feature-scenario-*' | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 Name,LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize"

tasks.label: remove-cancel-files
args: if exist tests\features\03_ContractB\07_cancel_contract_b.feature del /f /q tests\features\03_ContractB\07_cancel_contract_b.feature & if exist tests\features\03_ContractB\08_approve_cancellation_contract_b.feature del /f /q tests\features\03_ContractB\08_approve_cancellation_contract_b.feature & if exist tests\steps\ContractB\cancel_contract_b.steps.ts del /f /q tests\steps\ContractB\cancel_contract_b.steps.ts & if exist tests\support\cucumber-contractb.mjs del /f /q tests\support\cucumber-contractb.mjs & if exist reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancellation_lifecycle.json del /f /q reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancellation_lifecycle.json & if exist reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancellation_lifecycle.html del /f /q reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancellation_lifecycle.html & if exist reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancel_only.json del /f /q reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancel_only.json & if exist reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancel_only.html del /f /q reports\cucumber_contract_b_cancel_only.html

tasks.label: git-commit-cancel-lifecycle
tasks.command: git commit -m "feat(contract-b): add cancel request and cancellation approval lifecycle (07+08)" -m "- Feature 07: broker initiates cancel request on approved Contract B" -m "- Feature 08: owner approves cancellation, asserts contract status Cancelled" -m "- Hardened Contracts tab navigation with multi-fallback + overlay wait" -m "- Post-approval re-search and td[7] status assertion" && echo COMMITTED_OK

tasks.label: git-merge-to-baseline
tasks.command: git checkout feat/full-automation-baseline && git merge feat/create-contract-b --no-ff -m "Merge feat/create-contract-b: Contract B full lifecycle (create, approve, cancel, approve-cancel)" && echo MERGE_OK

tasks.label: git-commit-remaining
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json contract-data.json reports/ && git commit -m "chore: update tasks config, contract data, and report artifacts" && echo COMMITTED_REST_OK

tasks.label: git-merge-final
tasks.command: git checkout feat/full-automation-baseline && git merge feat/create-contract-b --no-ff -m "Merge feat/create-contract-b: Contract B full lifecycle (create, approve, cancel, approve-cancel)" && git log --oneline -8 && echo MERGE_DONE

tasks.label: git-commit-tasks-then-merge
tasks.command: git add .vscode/tasks.json && git commit -m "chore: update VS Code tasks after lifecycle runs" && git checkout feat/full-automation-baseline && git merge feat/create-contract-b --no-ff -m "Merge feat/create-contract-b: Contract B full lifecycle (create, approve, cancel, approve-cancel)" && git log --oneline -8 && echo MERGE_DONE
